#+title: Vendored native sources

ColorLisp vendors generated grammar sources so installation is deterministic
and never downloads code at runtime. Only the generated C parsers, external
scanners, required parser headers, highlight queries, and licenses are used.

Tree-sitter runtime:

- tree-sitter/tree-sitter :: =64402de2857cc197ecc4ca3bc144ea91fda7e72e= (v0.26.11)
